svg.text: Speed→color: 100M amber, 1G blue, 10G green, 25G teal, 40G purple, 100G red
Media→style: fiber solid, copper dashed, DAC dotted, stacking sparse dots
Trunk representation: double-line, label includes trunk id + member count
STP blocked shown only when data exists
Shading by type: switch/firewall/server/AP plus stack and HA clusters
